name: Canned Cake Hints
recipeIngredient: 1 Ball Quilted Crystal Canning Jar (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Determine the volume of your cake recipe by testing with one jar, filling it ½ full and baking to see how high the cake rises. Aim for the cake to rise within ¼ to ½ inch from the lip of the jar.
2. Sterilize as many jars as you think will be needed (usually around 8).
3. Adjust baking time based on the moistness of the cake; typically 35-40 minutes, checking at 30 minutes.
4. Use Ball Quilted Crystal Canning Jars (#14400-81400) or similar for easy removal and moisture retention.
5. Place new lids (with condensation) onto the jars without wiping them dry.
